channel.title: whokilledtulpa
channel.description: Security, OSINT, and digital forensics notes by Ayan Ambesh.

item.title: SQL Injection Detection
item.description: A practical first-pass methodology to detect SQL injection through behavior changes, boolean logic checks, time delays, and database fingerprinting.

item.title: Cross Site Scripting (XSS)
item.description: Since I have already written blogs on learning web pentesting, this time I am writing a series covering major web vulnerabilities, starting with XSS.

item.title: How you can truly learn pentesting
item.description: Reconnaissance is the foundation of web application pentesting. Learn how to understand an application before testing vulnerabilities.
